sutta: now the house father anatha pindika came to visit the exalted 1 paid respect etc as he said at 1 site the exalted 1 said this to him house father possessed of 4 things the aryan disciple has entered on the householders path of duty a path with which brings good repute and leads to the heaven world what are the 4 herein house father the aryan disciple waits upon the order of monks the sangha monks he waits upon the sangha of monks with the offer of a robe arms food lodging requisites and medicines for use in sickness these are the 4 things i hear the buddha is saying that a buddhist disciple has house holders duty to look after the monk and supply the monk with the 4 requisites the first 1 is a robe second 1 is arms food third 1 is lodging and the fourth 1 is requisites and medicine for use in sickness so if a lay person serves the sangha waits upon the sangha with these 4 things he is doing his or her duty and he will get the reward now the buddha said no a path which brings good repute and leads to the heaven world so if you do this householders duty to the sangha he will bring a lot of merit especially if you are virtuous and the monk is virtuous also now the nexus is
